name: RDS storage encryption not enabled
description: RDS storage encryption is disabled. Database data at rest — including automated backups, read replicas, and snapshots — is stored in plaintext, violating data protection requirements.
remediation: Enable storage encryption. Note: RDS encryption can only be enabled at creation time. Migrate existing unencrypted instances by: (1) take a snapshot, (2) copy snapshot with encryption, (3) restore to a new encrypted instance, (4) update DNS/connection strings, (5) decommission old instance.
